programme.title: Dropped: Project Yukon: Horses Can Think... Rafts Can't
programme.desc: Casey has a decision to make after getting into a precarious position.

programme.title: Fight to Survive: Jackson Jordan
programme.desc: Visiting with Jackson Jordon to discuss his narrow escape from death in the woods of Georgia after an attack from a pack of coyotes when he was only 16.

programme.title: Danger Decoded
programme.desc: A parachute jump doesn't go according to plan for a group of skydivers a hazardous storm in Taiwan endangers some motorists.

programme.title: Danger Decoded
programme.desc: A helicopter accident causes chaos in the workplace a snow truck rescue attempt goes wrong a construction worker is trapped.

programme.title: Air Rescue: Cruise Ship Rescue
programme.desc: De Anna and her husband celebrate their 50th anniversary on a luxury cruise. Far out at sea, the ship's doctor calls for urgent help, but rescue remains a challenge due to their remote location.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: A young man flips his quad bike he cannot move his neck the crew responds to a call for a homebuilder who falls through a roof while doing a DIY project a dog is trapped on a steep ocean cliff as the tide rises.

programme.title: Chopper Squad
programme.desc: The crew races to save two teenage girls whose car crashed and rolled.

programme.title: Chopper Squad
programme.desc: The team respond to reports of a life-or death emergency Jim Te Whata has been pulled from the water cold, unconscious and not breathing.

programme.title: Coast Guard Cape Disappointment: Pacific Northwest
programme.desc: A cutter attempts to cross the bar in rough water a gravely injured ice climber is rescued in the mountains a young man is teetering on the edge of a cliff.

programme.title: Coast Guard Cape Disappointment: Pacific Northwest
programme.sub-title: From the Mountains to the Ocean
programme.desc: There are reports of illegal activity on a fishing vessel aircrews search for hikers lost in the snowy mountains crews race to rescue an injured surfer.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue: No Short Cuts
programme.desc: Defying posted warnings, a snowboarder ventures into high-risk avalanche territory-and pays the price the SAR team faces a race against weather and terrain to extract him safely.
